method_description: Two distinct opt-out paths exist. Path 1 (native, on-domain): The FAQ, ToS Section 4, and privacy policy all link to https://www.peoplesmart.com/svc/optout/search/contact_optouts. Per the FAQ, this flow is: search by first/last name + state, select matching record, enter disposable email + complete CAPTCHA, receive verification email and click confirmation link, record removed within 24-72 hours. Path 2 (cross-domain, BeenVerified): The homepage footer 'Do Not Sell My Personal Information' link is the only link on the entire site that points to https://www.beenverified.com/app/optout/contact-search. Every other page's footer ('Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information', 'Opt-Out') links back to the native PeopleSmart path. Both paths are gated by Cloudflare Turnstile managed challenge (403). The relationship between the two paths is unclear — BeenVerified is never mentioned in the ToS or privacy policy.
bot_check: Cloudflare Turnstile managed challenge confirmed on the native opt-out page (/svc/optout/search/contact_optouts) and on the BeenVerified cross-domain opt-out — both return 403 with 'Just a moment...' interstitial that never resolves in automated browsers (tested 60+ seconds, 12 retry attempts). This is Cloudflare Turnstile, NOT reCAPTCHA. However, the privacy policy Section 13.1(d) confirms the site uses both 'Google reCAPTCHA and Cloudflare' — so the opt-out form behind the Turnstile gate may use reCAPTCHA (which PIR supports), but this could not be confirmed because Turnstile blocks access to the form.

tier_1.failure_cause: Requires inbox access to complete verification

notes: Primary failure: The FAQ explicitly states the opt-out requires email verification — 'verify your request to opt out by clicking on the link in our verification email'. This requires inbox access and fails Tier 1. Two opt-out paths observed: (1) Native path at /svc/optout/search/contact_optouts — linked from FAQ, ToS Section 4, privacy policy, and footers of all subpages (FAQ, ToS, privacy policy). (2) Cross-domain path at beenverified.com/app/optout/contact-search — linked ONLY from the homepage footer 'Do Not Sell My Personal Information' (data-ga-action='Help', data-ga-label='Opt out'). On every other page, the equivalent footer links ('Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information', 'Opt-Out') point to the native PeopleSmart URL. The homepage footer is the sole inconsistency. BeenVerified is NOT mentioned in the ToS or privacy policy. The corporate entity is 'The Lifetime Value Co. LLC acting through PeopleSmart LLC' (privacy policy Section 1.1), owned by 'The Lifetime Value Co. LLC' (Section 17.1). Section 5.3 references 'our group of companies (subsidiaries, ultimate holding company and all its subsidiaries)' but never names them. Footer metadata hints at the relationship: Affiliates link has data-ga-label='Affiliates (BV)', Careers link goes to ltvco.com. Additional observations: (1) Cloudflare Turnstile gates both opt-out paths. Privacy policy Section 13.1(d) confirms 'Google reCAPTCHA and Cloudflare' are both used — the form behind Turnstile may use reCAPTCHA but this is unconfirmed. (2) Homepage search is B2B-oriented (name + company + job title). The ToS Section 1 describes personal use cases ('reconnect with long-lost friends or relatives, learn about backgrounds of neighbors, online dates'), so PeopleSmart is not exclusively B2B. (3) Privacy policy Section 18.3 describes a broader CCPA opt-out via email (privacy@peoplesmart.com), phone, or mail — separate from the People Search opt-out, may not require email verification, but is a manual CCPA rights exercise. (4) Only one record can be opted out at a time via the online process — additional records require emailing privacy@PeopleSmart.com. (5) California flow could not be compared due to Cloudflare block.
